_comment: ANTA / TelecomTV connector stubs. None wired yet — replace placeholder URLs with your stood-up MCP servers. Remove this _comment key before going live.

anta-supabase._comment: MCP server in front of the ANTA Supabase: operators, vendors, telco universe, cycle_snapshots. The agent should check what's already known before re-reading a filing.

filings-store._comment: MCP server over the filings folder (PDFs of annual reports, 10-Ks/20-Fs, quarterlies, earnings call transcripts). Could be a local FS MCP server or Egnyte/Drive.

telecomtv-archive._comment: Optional: TelecomTV editorial archive, so the agent can cite prior coverage alongside primary filings.
